sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports chills and nausea following bilateral reduction mammoplasty. She also describes some discomfort with the scar tissue.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The incisions are well-healed with no signs of infection or redness. Scar tissue is widened in one area.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are consistent with post-operative discomfort and potential scar tissue complications.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Rescribe scar gel and instruct the patient to massage the area daily. Schedule a follow-up appointment in six months to reassess the scar tissue.
